description: The government was forced to pay {cost} currency to deal with an emergency.
A viral outbreak has broken out in {province}, requiring {cost} currency to fund relief efforts.
A bad harvest in {province} forced us to provide critical food supplies, costing {cost} currency.
A viral outbreak has broken out in {province}, however we do not have {cost} currency to fund relief efforts.
A bad harvest in {province} requires critical food supplies for {cost} currency, which we unfortunately cannot pay for at the moment.
A mine has caved in within {province}!
Miners in {province} report that a mine has collapsed.
An unfortunate event has occured in {province}, where the collapse of a mine resulted in {deaths} casualties.
We have searched every coffer and managed to scrape together an extra {profit} currency to help the economy!
The good people of {province} have raised {profit} currency to help the development of our nation!
An international charity organization has donated {profit} currency to our government!
A bigger than usual {resource} deposit was excavated in {province}, giving us {amount} extra {resource}!
Miners in {province} discovered a rich {resource} deposit in {province}! A total of {amount} {resource} was obtained.
An organization has deduced that global poverty is on the decline, albeit with minor challenges ahead.
International economic forums predict increased cooperation in the industrial world.
A small group of economists weigh the environmental risks of industrialization.
Rough weather in {province} has caused major property damage. We decided to aid reconstruction efforts with {cost} currency.
A tornado just wreaked havoc in {province}. We have paid {cost} currency to fund relief efforts there.
Rough weather in {province} has caused major property damage. Although we should aid reconstruction efforts, we cannot afford the fee of {cost} currency.
A tornado just wreaked havoc in {province}. However we cannot afford to pay {cost} currency to fund relief efforts there.
A factory in {province} required {cost} currency to keep up with repairs.
A total of {cost} currency was needed to pay for the maintenance of a factory in {province}.
A factory in {province} has needed repairs for a while, but we are unable to afford the {cost} currency required to pay for it. As a result it has closed down.
Citizens in {province} held a celebration to mark another year in their history!
A parade was held in the streets of {province}!
Infrastructure in {province} broke down, forcing our government to use {cost} currency to repair it.
Infrastructure in {province} had been left in a poor state for a while. However we cannot afford {cost} currency to fix it, so it has collapsed.
Authorities have arrested smugglers in {province}, confiscating {profit} currency.
Law enforcement has successfully busted a small criminal group operating within the country, confiscating {profit} currency.
An electrical outage has occured in {province}! All factories in {province} will now be temporarily shut down for {days} days to facilitate repairs.
A major storm in {province} tampered with the electrical lines, forcing all factories in {province} to halt production for {days} days.
A friendly nation in our neighborhood offered us {amount} {resource} to supplement our stocks!
We recieved foreign aid of {amount} {resource} to help our economy.
The global stock market is preparing in the midst of geopolitical tensions.
A politician was caught smuggling {amount} {resource}! They have been fined {profit} in compensation.
